tw_counters.note: Priority: Kill Death Trooper Terentatek first to break the protection recovery engine.
Use Drogan to nuke Captain Enoch immediately to stop 'Decay' stacks.
Whistling Birds help bypass the heavy critical avoidance of the Clones.
Standard non-GL counter. Rex's TM gain is essential to outpace the handmaidens.
Insta-kill MQG to remove the massive offensive threat.
TRAP: No GAC Omi. You will likely be stunned and timed out.
Need Dark Rey for the damage ramp to outpace Hondo's revives.
UFU stat-stacking can brute force Hondo if you focus Silvo first.
Cal's 'Impatience' is the key to locking down Drogan.
Beskar stacks on SLKR are mandatory to survive the Rebel Ambush.
Mace's TW Omi makes Jedi tanky enough to ignore the Thermal Detonators.
Whistling Birds ignore the massive defense of Krrsantan.
Nuke Sabine first. Do NOT nuke Ezra first in TW due to her Omicron.
Only works if Ezra is not present to dispel the Decoy.
Juhani's TW Omi makes this much safer than the GAC version.
Dark Rey provides the anti-unaligned force user tech needed.
Target the Shield Generator first. Use AoEs to chip it while Taunted.
They ignore Protection, making the Gungan health pool look tiny.
Cleanse 'Spirit' debuffs immediately to avoid the instant-kill thresholds.
High speed requirement. If they get a turn, you lose.
Increasing Juhani's cooldowns prevents her from keeping the team immortal.
TRAP: Wampa will fail here without the GAC solo buffs.
Even without GAC Omi, Traya's lead punishes Geo assists perfectly.
Echo's daze shuts down the entire swarm mechanic.
LV is the safest way to absorb the initial Seven Sisters onslaught.
Extreme speed check. You must stun Reva before she takes a turn.
Target Beq first. STAP's true damage ignores the Jedi protection recovery.
Savage needs to be R7+ to survive the initial Jedi burst.
Must outspeed Rex. If Rex goes first, your Troopers will never take a turn.
Malak solos the smaller Phoenix builds; Fear controls the TM gain.
